articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai
articles.title: Apple says no one using Lockdown Mode has been hacked with spyware - TechCrunch
articles.description: The tech giant's claim that it has not seen any successful spyware attacks targeting Apple devices with Lockdown Mode enabled comes amid a leak of hacking tools targeting users running devices with older software.
articles.content: Almost four years after launching a security feature called Lockdown Mode, Apple says it has yet to see a case where someone’s device was hacked with these additional security protections switched on… [+4154 chars]
